cleanupOldProposals().details: Can be called by anyone to incentivize cleanup

params.jobCapacities: job capacity for each worker measured in resources/time (ie GB/hr)
params.jobWorkers: worker addresses associated with completed jobs
params.validatorsToRemove: any inactive validators that were not found on P2P

cleanupOldProposals().notice: Clean up old proposals to save storage costs

createProposal(bytes32).notice: Creates a new proposal represented by a hash of all the essential data to update from the aggregated off-chain state.

executeProposal(uint256,address[],bytes3.notice: Execute a proposal with comprehensive validation if enough votes are received

expireProposal(uint256).notice: Force expire a specific proposal that's older than MAX_PROPOSAL_AGE

halfStateTime().notice: Half update configuration parameters to allow double to proposal creation times
